title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) - DOM-based
proof: GET /vulnerabilities/xss_d/?default=%3Cscript%3Ealert(1)%3C/script%3E - the page JavaScript reads window.location.href for the 'default=' parameter and writes it via document.write() without sanitization: 'document.write("<option value='" + lang + "'>" + decodeURI(lang) + "</option>");'. The decodeURI call allows script injection through the URL fragment or query string.
